profile.name: Mannan Javid
profile.tagline: Frontend Product Engineer building AI-powered user experiences | React, TypeScript, Next.js | Health & Wellbeing
profile.bio: I work as a multi-disciplinary engineer, leader, and student. I've built products across non-profits, government, and commercial teams — and I measure my success by the strength of those around me.

education.description: Hands-on engineer leading innovation in the university. Published robotics research, won pitch competitions, and delivered the university's first multi-disciplinary engineering project.

narrative.title: Wellbeing by Design
narrative.content: Engineering is not neutral. Every system either improves or diminishes human wellbeing. My work deliberately chooses the former — building products that serve millions securely, making healthcare more accessible, and eliminating the failures that frustrate real people.
narrative.highlight: The through-line across every role: technology in service of people.

narrative.title: Impact at Scale
narrative.content: 3M+ daily users served with zero security incidents. 40% faster code reviews. 33% fewer defects. 100K API failures eliminated. 20% increase in healthcare access.
narrative.highlight: Measured not by lines shipped, but by lives improved.

narrative.title: In The Arena
narrative.content: It is not the critic who counts. I ship products, teach students, volunteer in communities, found startups, build robots, and hold space for others to grow. Multi-disciplinary by practice, not by label.

narrative.title: Continue
narrative.content: Ready to build something that matters?

experience.skills: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Python, FastAPI, Vercel AI SDK, Claude, MCP, Cloudflare
experience.description: AI product studio & consulting agency shipping production-grade full-stack AI platforms.
highlights: Shipped a full-stack AI circadian-health platform that turns any US zip code into real-time daily timing guidance, backed by an AI chat, a 50K-LOC FastAPI engine, dynamically-rendered Vercel AI UI components, and an MCP server exposing 14 tools to LLMs.

Engineered offline-first, agent-editable apps on Cloudflare Workers with local-first sync, conflict resolution, and custom HMAC magic-link auth, all controllable through SSE-streaming AI chat with full undo.

Architected end-to-end AI video pipelines that convert audio and transcripts into animated 1080p videos, replacing manual editing with automated scene segmentation, illustration, cinematography, and multilingual dubbing.
Built a YouTube intelligence platform with a multi-provider LLM abstraction and enrichment to improve the player experience.

Designed and built a complete personal-brand platform — blog, newsletter, lead capture, and his 'Unbinding' program — for relationship coach Hans Morningstar , handed off on Lovable so he can update the live site himself through plain-English AI prompts instead of code.

Embedded as an AI engineering consultant for Intruex — architecting full-stack web application features, standing up the team's end-to-end AI agent harness (agent orchestration, MCP server integration, and skills configuration) for LLM-driven workflows in production, and building Playwright test coverage to catch regressions before release.

experience.skills: Security, Splunk, New Relic, PagerDuty, Springboot, Astro, SolidJS, Node.js, DevSecOps
experience.description: Led security operations, remediation, and engineering for high-scale applications serving 3m+ DAU, achieving zero security incidents while delivering secure microservices and customer-facing features.
highlights: Engineered high-traffic microservices and customer-facing features (Trade-In, Auto Loan Rates, SEO) using modern frameworks (Astro, SolidJS, Node.js), architecting scalable solutions serving millions of daily users with robust performance and zero production vulnerabilities.

Led production security monitoring and incident response operations using Splunk and New Relic, creating custom SPL queries for threat detection, building real-time alerting dashboards, and providing 24/7 on-call support via PagerDuty to ensure rapid response to security events.

Drove platform reliability and security remediation initiatives across 3M+ DAU applications, leading Springboot upgrades and vulnerability patching programs, enhancing CI/CD pipelines to strengthen cloud security posture, and reducing API failures by 100K through systematic infrastructure improvements.
Won internal hackathon for innovative developer tooling, accelerating code review velocity by 40% across the engineering organization.

experience.skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, ArcGIS, AWS, Java, leadership
experience.description: Led implementation and oversight of developers to deliver features ahead of schedule and improve company-wide velocity. Initiated and introduced major feature rewrites.
highlights: Built interactive healthcare facility mapping using ArcGIS and Angular, enabling healthcare officials to map out providers across regions — increasing healthcare access by 20% across underserved regions.
Led code review standardization and mentorship programs, reducing defect rates by 33% and establishing quality benchmarks adopted company-wide.
Designed and implemented Angular Material UI component library for consistent cross-team design patterns, accelerating feature delivery timelines.

experience.skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, Cesium, LeafletJS, ArcGIS, AWS, culture
experience.description: Mid-level frontend engineer on mapping systems that informed national security needs. Champion and advocate for company culture.
highlights: Developed geospatial mapping and probability simulation tools using Cesium and LeafletJS for real-time intelligence visualization, directly supporting national security decision-making.
Built interactive data visualization dashboards processing large-scale geospatial datasets, enabling analysts to identify patterns across multi-dimensional threat landscapes.
Championed engineering culture initiatives including mentorship programs, knowledge-sharing sessions, and cross-team collaboration frameworks.

experience.skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, Python, Python Django, AWS, research
experience.description: Engineer, researcher and experimenter in national initiatives addressing cloud, cyber security, and tax system shortages.
highlights: Contributed to IRS tax system modernization through cloud migration R&D, implementing OAuth2/JWT authentication patterns and automated testing frameworks using Python Django and AWS.
Researched and prototyped cyber security tooling for federal cloud infrastructure, developing monitoring solutions for threat detection across distributed systems.
Built internal research platforms enabling cross-team collaboration on national security and public interest technology initiatives.

experience.skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, Firebase, Stripe, startup, marketing
experience.description: Founder for a plate to door food delivery startup in the greater Washington DC area.
Fullstack engineer for America's cooperatives. Committed to stewarding sustainability in energy generation and cutting edge research.

extracurriculars.name: Substitute Teacher
extracurriculars.description: Public school teacher and instructional assistant for elementary, middle and high schools across Fairfax County and Southern Bethesda in Maryland and Virginia across English, Math, for emotionally limited and special needs students.

extracurriculars.name: Volunteering
extracurriculars.description: Volunteering and service across a variety of initiatives including: Food distribution and drives, STEM Students Lego Mindstorm & ARCHR robotics demo, Local community initiatives for the underserved and more.

extracurriculars.name: Nomadic Travel
extracurriculars.description: Travel and living in a variety of locations from the West Coast, California, stewarding sustainability in ecovillages in California and Hawaii, to car camping across national parks across Washington, Oregon and California,

extracurriculars.name: Applied Jung
extracurriculars.skills: Analytical psychology, community men's work, embodiment & mindfulness
extracurriculars.description: Training and application of community building and Jungian individuation techniques, holding a community space for men to learn healthy models of masculinity.

writing.title: Seeking Community
writing.description: From Cosmos to car camping to Hawaii — a journey through spirituality, community, and finding guiding principles.

writing.title: Health is an Artform
writing.description: A decade of health optimization, reversing prediabetes, and why wellbeing became my north star.

writing.title: Here are some things I've learned about parenting
writing.description: From self application and observation — self-parenting beliefs, and practices for respect, agency, and dignity.

writing.title: Joyful Frustrations
writing.description: Can frustration be joyful? Yes it sure can

research.title: Apparatus for Remote Control of Humanoid Robots
research.description: An intuitive teleoperation system for high degree of freedom humanoid robots with haptic feedback, enabling untrained operators to control complex robots for disaster response. Submitted to IEEE/RSJ IROS 2015 and taken to DARPA Robotics Challenge.

research.title: Open Modeling Framework Demand Response
research.description: Cost-benefit analysis model for demand response programs built for rural electric cooperatives using NRECA's Open Modeling Framework, simulating TOU, CPP, PTR, and DLC programs.

research.title: Apparatus for Remote Control of Humanoid Robots
research.description: Lead developer for an intuitive teleoperation system for high degree of freedom humanoid robots with haptic feedback, enabling untrained operators to control complex robots for disaster response. Published and submitted to IEEE/RSJ IROS 2015 and taken to DARPA Robotics Challenge. One-to-one hand-puppetered mimickry with Oculus VR streaming, controllers for ARCHR, Mini-Hubo, and Baxter robots.

research.title: Solar Workspace
research.description: Lead CAD designer for wiring schematics and 3D mechanical designs in Solidworks for a solar-powered outdoor collaborative study hub. The university's first multi-disciplinary engineering project, bringing together electrical, mechanical, and civil engineering students to deliver a sustainable campus installation.

research.title: DC Dome Light
research.description: Extracurricular research project designing a portable dome light in Solidworks 3D with wiring schematics for the travel industry.

files.label: Open Modeling Framework demand response research

contact.how: Email and phone are not published openly. The contact form in the Contact section of mannan.is reveals contact details to humans after a short validated message; agents should direct a human there, or reach out via GitHub.
